text: The contrast between the sterile, glass-walled hallway and the vibrant, idea-rich R+D space whispers of a passage between everyday routine and a realm of thought and questioning. Here, reflection is encouraged. I feel a quiet sense of anticipation—the kind you experience before entering a place where your assumptions might be challenged and your identity gently unraveled. The words on the screen resonate with my own vulnerability. I linger between curiosity and self-consciousness, wondering how I will be seen, how I will see myself. The environment stirs both excitement and a tinge of discomfort, but I am drawn forward, eager to explore what it means to coexist with intelligence—my own, others’, and the artificial.
